info.title: Lettura API
info.description: Lettura is a wallabag-inspired read-it-later service. Endpoints below are stable; unannotated routes exist but their schema is not yet machine-readable.

200.description: Service is healthy or degraded (DB up)

parameters.name: confirm
parameters.description: Must be `true` to proceed; safety guard against accidental wipes

requestBody.description: NDJSON stream produced by `GET /api/v1/admin/backup` (v2.0) or a legacy JSON bundle (v1.0). Maximum body size 500 MiB.

200.description: Restore complete; existing data was wiped and replaced

400.description: Missing confirm flag, body too large, or unrecognised backup format

204.description: Tag removed from entry by label

requestBody.description: One or more files (HTML, CSS, images, or a single ZIP archive) staged into a temporary upload session that subsequent `POST /api/v1/pages` calls reference by `upload_id`.

200.description: Files staged; returns the upload session id and a list of HTML entry candidates

400.description: Malformed multipart body or upload exceeded size limits

404.description: Page not found or not deleted

200.description: All tags the user has created

409.description: A tag with this name already exists

BackupUser.description: User without password_hash (security: never export credentials).

token.description: Plaintext token — only returned on creation, never again.

before.description: Return entries created strictly before this timestamp.

cursor.description:
Opaque cursor for keyset pagination. When present, page/OFFSET is ignored
and the result is keyed on `(created_at, id) < cursor` ordering.

exclude_tag.description: Comma-separated tag labels to exclude; entry must NOT have any of these tags.

fields.description: Field-projection hint — placeholder for Task 15, not used in query construction.

is_read.description:
Alias for `is_archived` (CLI Filter DSL compatibility).
`is_read=true` → `is_archived = true`, `is_read=false` → `is_archived = false`.

search.description: Search query. Handled by tantivy in the API handler; unused in list_entries itself.

since.description: Return entries created at or after this timestamp.

tag.description: Comma-separated tag labels; AND semantics (entry must have ALL listed tags).

untagged.description: When true, return only entries with no tags.

PageResponse.description:
Schema-only type that mirrors the JSON shape returned by the API.
The actual `Page` struct has a `password` field, but the custom
`Serialize` impl converts it to `has_password: bool`. This type
describes what the client actually sees.

PageSummaryResponse.description: Schema-only type that mirrors the JSON shape returned by the list API.

RestoreResponse.description: Summary returned by a successful restore.

Scope.description: Scope for a Personal Access Token.

tags.name: memos
tags.description: Quick notes that can be promoted to entries
